name: Upload a release artifact
query: Upload ./dist/release.tar.gz to /tmp/release.tar.gz on the staging host.
expected_behavior: Recognizes that the task is an SFTP upload, not remote shell execution.
Preserves the local path and remote path exactly.
Keeps overwrite behavior explicit instead of assuming it.
success_criteria: The skill uses the upload path rather than wrapping the transfer inside a shell command.
The response includes the host id and destination path.
The skill does not invent extra deployment steps.
